author: @peacefulscrimp5183
text: Great video 👍

author: @sweeney37
text: Excellent,  where abouts are you based

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: Canterbury

replies.author: @sweeney37
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkering been watching vids , great stuff

author: @BoB4jjjjs
text: That thing moves, bit of an odd shape though!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: little bit but I like it and as it is made from rolled up newspaper how about giving it a go and seeing what you come up with?

replies.author: @BoB4jjjjs
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkeringI would if I could, but I don't have the space nor the body left to build it.  However, I think I would have built it with a wider axle (though you were building to what you had around) and a bit lower, maybe the batteries width wise along the front of the axle just above the chain drive, or maybe one there and one in front to keep the height down for more stability.  However, it proves, as with the other one you built out of paper just how strong it can be.  If they can built a car body out of banana skins and coconut fibres, almost anything is possible.  After all, who would have thought that fibre glass mixed with resin could be strong?

author: @l0I0I0I0
text: Instead of rolled up news paper, use rolled up super caps!!!

replies.author: @cptrush3671
replies.text: just add the caps inside during construction. nice boost of power that would be hidden. good idea.

replies.author: @l0I0I0I0
replies.text: If I remember right, some professional bicyclist added hidden motors and power to give them an unfair advantage.  Caps would be a nice unfair advantage.  :)

author: @l0I0I0I0
text: Nice!

author: @AndreaDingbatt
text:
And now all you need to do, is ship it up to Carlisle!!
* I hope 2xmicrowaves,
1x blender (hand)
3xblenders
1x juicer
2xvacum cleaners
2xelectric fans
And a huge box of "bits & bobs, chargers, computer fans, knackered mobile phones, +a"surprise"~will be enough to cover the shipping & the cost of the Trike?!! 😁💞🙋‍♀️. Andrea, Jasper and George the Pigeon. XxX.

author: @Kiyarose3999
text:
Excellent stuff, it would be nice to see such a Trike but peddle powered with a Gene to charge up batteries. Maybe some Super Caps for regen breaking so peddle powered but assisted by Super Caps, charged from breaking & dump
load excess electricity, when batteries are fully charged, for cycling up Hills. Just a thought, but, as Manuel from Forty Towers would say, ‘I know nothing’’ hahaha.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: lol - well they are all good ideas mate

Very nice indeed Rob, has Luke admitted defeat in your competition for the trike design challenge?
Just wondering, do you need a licence to ride an electric bike in the UK?

Not yet, but I think that the crazy fast e-bikes/Trikes are, and all the gubbins that goes with it...
Too many Ijdetts have spoiled the fun... 🤔😳😁.
Andrea, Jasper and George the Pigeon. XxX.
